summary: Excellent full soundboard release of a mellow 1987 show, delivering superb performance and pristine audio.
review: Both reviewers rave about this long‑sought full soundboard recording, calling the tape “fantastic” and praising its clarity after three decades in the vault. The concert itself is described as super mellow and beautiful, making it a standout memory for fans who experienced it live.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave five‑star ratings, highlighting an outstanding show and high‑quality soundboard source; limited to two reviews, confidence is set to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Full soundboard tape praised for its clarity and completeness after resurfacing after 30 years; no reported flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Relaxed, mellow vibe with smooth flow; reviewers emphasize the beautiful setting and super‑mellow atmosphere.
